text: PB - As a User, I want to re-order pages within the same parent/root via Nav - FE UI component
llm_output:
Scenario: Re-order pages within the same parent/root via navigation UI component  
Given I am logged into the application  
And I am on the navigation UI component page  
And I have a parent/root with multiple pages listed under it  
When I drag and drop a page to a new position within the same parent/root  
Then the page is successfully moved to the new position  
And the updated order of pages is displayed immediately in the navigation UI component

text: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
llm_output:
Scenario: User views the new landing page  
Given the user is not logged in  
When the user navigates to the website's homepage  
Then the user sees the new landing page with updated design, branding, and content

text: PB - As a User, I want to create a Drag & Drop Page (as a standalone Page) from Nav
llm_output:
Scenario: User creates a Drag & Drop Page from the navigation menu  
Given the user is logged into the application and is on the main dashboard  
When the user clicks on the "Create New Page" option in the navigation menu  
And selects "Drag & Drop Page" from the page type options  
And enters a valid page name in the input field  
And clicks the "Create" button  
Then a new standalone Drag & Drop Page is created  
And the user is redirected to the newly created Drag & Drop Page editor  
And the page name is displayed correctly in the editor header.

text: PB - As a User, I want to only select & see the combo of Widget and Block (bounding box experience) in Page Builder
llm_output:
Scenario: User selects and views a combo of Widget and Block in Page Builder  
Given the user is logged into the Page Builder application  
And the user is on the Page Builder interface  
And the interface displays available Widgets and Blocks  
When the user selects a specific Widget and Block combo  
Then only the selected Widget and Block combo is highlighted and displayed in a bounding box  
And the rest of the interface remains unchanged

text: As a User, I want to access Reply action for New Replies in Daily Digest Email
llm_output:
Scenario: Access Reply Action for New Replies in Daily Digest Email  
Given the user has received the Daily Digest Email with new replies  
When the user clicks on the "Reply" action link for a specific reply in the email  
Then the user is redirected to the reply interface for that specific reply in the application

text: As a user I want to see 'Bulk Review' in bulk review page header (page name)
llm_output:
Scenario: Display 'Bulk Review' in the bulk review page header  
Given the user is on the bulk review page  
When the page loads successfully  
Then the header should display the text 'Bulk Review'

text: As a user, I want to be able to see the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Markup Screen in Approvals so that I can markup the animation to get feedback and new revisions worked on
llm_output:
Scenario: View converted MP4 on Markup Screen for feedback  
Given the user has uploaded a GIF or Lottie File  
And the file has been successfully converted to MP4  
And the user is on the Approvals Markup Screen  
When the user selects the converted MP4 file  
Then the MP4 file is displayed on the Markup Screen  
And the user can interact with markup tools to provide feedback.

text: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
llm_output:
Scenario: User views the new landing page  
Given the user is not logged in  
When the user navigates to the website's homepage  
Then the user sees the new landing page with updated design, branding, and content

text: As a User, I want to open current location for single / same folder Move
llm_output:
Scenario: Open current location for moving a single folder  
Given the user is logged into the system and is on the file management interface  
And the user has selected a single folder to move  
When the user initiates the move action  
Then the current location of the selected folder is displayed to the user

text: As an Internal User, I want to have MCP(development use only) settings to enable/disable features per Epic for Drag & Drop Page MVP
llm_output:
Scenario: Enable a feature for Drag & Drop Page MVP using MCP settings  
Given I am an Internal User with access to the MCP settings  
And the MCP settings page is accessible  
And the feature toggle for the specific Epic is available in the MCP settings  
When I enable the feature toggle for the Epic in the MCP settings  
Then the feature for the Drag & Drop Page MVP associated with the Epic is enabled  
And the changes are saved successfully in the MCP settings

text: As a User, I want Surface Question/Answer/Rating back end data in weekly report / script
llm_output:
Scenario: Generate a weekly report with Question/Answer/Rating data  
Given the backend system has stored Question/Answer/Rating data  
And the user has access to the reporting tool  
When the user requests the weekly report  
Then the system generates a report containing the Question/Answer/Rating data for the past week  
And the report is formatted and delivered to the user successfully.

text: As a User, I want to switch Page Categories when viewing a Page if there are multiple Page Categories
llm_output:
Scenario: Switching Page Categories when viewing a Page  
Given I am viewing a Page with multiple Page Categories  
When I select a different Page Category from the category menu  
Then the content of the Page updates to display information relevant to the selected Page Category

text: PB - As a User, I want to add Widgets directly to a Section
llm_output:
Scenario: Adding a Widget to a Section  
Given I am logged into the application  
And I am on the page displaying available Sections  
And a Section is visible and selectable  
And a list of available Widgets is displayed  
When I select a Widget from the list  
And I drag and drop the Widget into the desired Section  
Then the Widget is added to the Section  
And the Section displays the newly added Widget

text: BP - As a User, I want to single select resources from Resource Lookup with unchangeable filter based on file type in Page Builder
llm_output:
Scenario: Single select a resource from Resource Lookup with a fixed file type filter  
Given I am on the Page Builder interface  
And the Resource Lookup is displayed with a fixed filter for a specific file type  
When I select a resource from the list  
Then the selected resource is highlighted  
And only one resource is selected  
And the selection respects the unchangeable file type filter

text: As a user I want to run a stats report for database tool and see files from multi upload field represented each on their own row (excluding in Duplicable sections)
llm_output:
Scenario: Generate stats report with files from multi-upload field represented on separate rows  
Given the user has access to the database tool  
And the user has uploaded multiple files in the multi-upload field  
And the files are not part of any Duplicable sections  
When the user runs the stats report  
Then the report should display each file from the multi-upload field on its own row  
And no files from Duplicable sections should be included in the report.

text: As a user, I want to be able to preview the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Review Request screen in Approvals so that I can preview what the animation is when approving
llm_output:
Scenario: Preview converted MP4 animation on Review Request screen  
Given the user is on the Review Request screen in Approvals  
And the Review Request contains a converted MP4 file from a GIF or Lottie File  
When the user clicks on the preview button for the MP4 file  
Then the MP4 animation should play in a preview window  
And the user should be able to view the animation without downloading the file.

text: As a user, I want to see the database name and record name in the header
llm_output:
Scenario: Display database name and record name in the header  
Given the user is logged into the application  
And the user has selected a database  
And the user has opened a specific record within the database  
When the user views the header of the application  
Then the header should display the name of the selected database  
And the header should display the name of the opened record

text: PB - (Misc) As a User, I want to be informed why the Page cannot be saved in Page Builder if it's beyond the set Page limit in MCP
llm_output:
Scenario: Display error message when Page exceeds set Page limit in MCP  
Given the user is editing a Page in Page Builder  
And the set Page limit in MCP has been exceeded  
When the user attempts to save the Page  
Then an error message is displayed stating "The Page cannot be saved because it exceeds the set Page limit in MCP"  
And the Page is not saved.

text: As a User, I want to configure both Block and Video Widget properties
llm_output:
Scenario: Configure properties for Block and Video Widgets  
Given the user is logged into the application and is on the widget configuration page  
When the user selects a Block Widget and updates its properties (e.g., title, background color)  
And the user selects a Video Widget and updates its properties (e.g., video URL, autoplay setting)  
Then the updated properties for the Block Widget should be saved and displayed correctly  
And the updated properties for the Video Widget should be saved and displayed correctly

text: As a Database Manager, I want to allow end users to Add More child records ('Add More') - Handle maximum child records
llm_output:
Scenario: Adding child records up to the maximum allowed limit  
Given the user is logged into the system as a Database Manager  
And the user is on the "Add More Child Records" page  
And the system allows a maximum of 10 child records per parent record  
And the parent record has fewer than 10 child records currently associated  
When the user clicks the "Add More" button  
And the user fills in the required details for a new child record  
And the user clicks the "Save" button  
Then the new child record is successfully added to the parent record  
And the total number of child records for the parent record is updated  
And a confirmation message "Child record added successfully" is displayed.
